since_last: 66% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.02%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.43% · Gold +1.40% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 66% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.02%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.02%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +7.49%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +7.49%, SKHY +7.17%, INTC +5.91%, MU +5.88%, TER +5.84%. Laggards: WDAY -3.82%, ADBE -3.48%, INTU -3.09%, DV -2.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.89% at $122.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
